message.content:
1) No, there is no CRT/terminal glitch effect visible behind the text. The background is a smooth, dark gradient (black to dark brown) with no pixelated glyph patterns, scanlines, or ember/orange tint.  
2) The text "oh.... hey!" is fully readable on top, with high contrast against the dark background.  
3) The glitch effect is absent, so it neither acts as a subtle texture nor is overpowering.  
4) Overall, it does not look like a polished cinematic contact section with a glitch effect. Instead, it has a minimalist, understated aesthetic with a smooth dark gradient and clear, legible text.
